summary: Mode-packing around 0.30 with low pressure risk can still feel syrupy or effortful and should be visible as a viscous/felt-dead-zone band.
The pressure trend and high-entropy smoothing surfaces should preserve drift evidence without mistaking low risk for low effort.
More aggressive viscosity weighting between 0.25 and 0.35 mode-packing would alter live pressure/porosity interpretation and needs V2 approval.
